titleStmt.title: SII 34.46: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 46. Tiruppanandāḷ, Kumbakonam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the south wall of the first prākāra of the Arjunajaṭēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga I, 29th year = A.D. 1099.

Registers the sale by a temple priest (Śivabrāhmaṇa) of his right of worship to recoup a portion of money which he had misappropriated from the temple treasury (in the form of gold and silver ornaments, bronze utensils, etc.). He and several others of his colleagues had been habitual offenders since long as known from previous official investigations carried out respectively by Rājarāja-mūvēndavēḷār, the Sēnāpati Pallavarājar and the Sēnāpati Nandiyarājar in the 3rd year of Adhirājēdra (1070), and in the 8th and 21st years of the present king (1078 and 1091 respectively). On the present occasion while the king visited the temple for worship he was informed about the disruption of services due to the misappropriation of the temple funds by the Śivabrāhmaṇas and thereupon he ordered for the recovery of the pilfered property.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī yāṇṭu 2 10 9 nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟi ti ttikaḷ śrīkulOttuṅka cOḻatEvar tirupparantāḷuṭaiyāraik kumpiṭṭu tiruccuṟṟumāḷikaiyilE Eḻuntaruḷiniṉṟu kuṅkiliyakkalaiyarkku
var cāttiyaruḷun tiruvāparaṇamum parikalapparicciṉṉamum Aḻittukkoṇṭu kaṭamai ceytilēneṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷa Avarkaḷukku kācu vaikka Upāyamillāmaiyil Ikkōyilil Āticaṇṭē
ṇakkāṇiyai nūṟṟaimpatu kācukku viṟṟuttantu nīkki niṉṟa kācu vaikkaikaṭavarkaḷānārkaḷeṉṟu viṇṇappañceyya Avarkaḷ viṟṟu tanta
ṭuvittukkoḷkaveṉṟu tiruvāy moḻintaruḷak kalveṭṭiṉapaṭi pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻcūḻnta puviyilp ponnēmiyaḷavun taṉnēminaṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkōpparuvattuc cakkarakōṭṭattu vikkirama
putuvariyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayilaḻu kontaḷavaraicar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻintut tōḷ valikāṭṭip pōrppari naṭātti ṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭitteṉṟi ru kamalappūm mpoṉṉi Āṭai
naṉṉilappāvai tanimaiyun tavirntu tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟcūṭi taṉṉaṭiyiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat toṉṉila vēntarcūṭa muṉṉai maṉuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟappac ceṅkōl ticaitōṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai nilaviḷākam Eṅkaṇu
taṉātu tiruni maruvil puliviḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟīvāntarattu pūpālar tiṟ Aiviṭunta kalam corikaḷiṟu muṟainiṟpa vilaṅkiya piṟakuyap piṟai latu taṉkai lile tā
koṭāvikka ṅkilitu māran ṭuvēḷattuṅkapattirai pukatturatti veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa taṉmāṉamuṅ kūṟiṉa vīramuṅkiṭappa vēṟiṉa malaikaḷu mutukuneḷippa viḻinta natikaḷum cuḻaṉṟuṭaittōṭa viḻukaṭalun talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticait
taṉṉāḷukantā tāṉaiyum paṉṉāḷiṭṭap pala pala mutukuṭi payattetirmāṟiya ja rutiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta puramum celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantaiyarīṭṭamum mīḷātu koṭutta veṅkariniraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇaveṉṉum paraṇi Iraṇ
ṭum Oruvicai koṇṭaruḷīṇṭiya pukaḻōṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum porukarittanaṅkaḷum tantiravāriyu muṉnatāy vantu vaṭakaṭal teṉkaṭal Aṭarvatu pōlat tan peruñcēṉaiyai Ēvip pañcavarai
vvarum poru māyka tañci verun neḷittōṭi Araṇeṉap pukka kāṭaṟat tuṭaittu nāṭaṭipaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vaṉacarar tiruyum poṟṟai veñcura mēṟṟi koṟṟa vijaiyastampam ticaitōṟu niṟutti muttiṉ calāpamum mu ttamiṭpotiyalu
ṅkaṟi Iṭaiyyac ṉṉiyuṅ ṭel ṭṭi kkaṭalmalai ṭuḷḷa cāvēṟellām ntaṉi vicumpē talai kalar koṭ toṟum nilai
kaḷiṭṭaruḷi puṉāṟ ttaruḷitta mu tiruppu ttappakalum po ḻunti kamu ṭāṅka ttu t ti ḷamuḻutuṭaiya
puvaluṭaṉ kaṅkai vīṟṟirunteṉa maṅkayar tilatam Ēḻicai vallapi Ēḻulakamuṭai yāḷ vāḻi malarntiruppa Ūḻiyun tirumā tu tiyākavalli Ulakuṭaiyāḷiruppa māvini puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vī kōvi rājakēcari
tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulOttuṅkacOḻa tEvarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 Āvatu virutarāja bhayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇi nāṭṭut tirupparantāḷt tiruttāṭakai yīśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar kOyilil (c)civabrāhmaṇaṉ kāśyapaṉ pāṇṭaṉ kumara
miye Ikkōyilil Āticaṇṭēcuratē civabrāhmaṇakkāṇi viṟṟukkuṭutta paricāvatu Ulakuyyakkoṇṭaruḷiṉa tēvarkku yāṇṭupati
tiyaruḷiṉa tiruvāparaṇaṅkaḷilum cemputarāveṇkalamuḷḷiṭṭa parikalaparic ciṉṉaṅkaḷilum Ikkōyililk kāṇiyāḷarāṉa civabrāhmaṇarōm nāṅkaḷ Aḻittu Okka koṇṭu kaṭavōmāna kācu Aiññūṟṟu nāṟpatukku vaitta kācu nāṉūṟṟaimpatu nīkkik
ṇṇūṟṟil nāṉ tiṅkaḷ vaṭṭattuṭaiyanāḷ nālaraikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku kācu mūṉṟākak kaṭava kācu patiṉmūṉṟaiyum Uṭaiyār śrīatirājēntratēvarkku yāṇṭu mūṉṟāvatu rājarājamūvēnta vēḷār Ittēvar paṇṭārañ cōtitta viṭattu nāṅkaḷ Aḻittu Okka ko
ṇṭu kaṭavōmāna poṉ Irupattorukaḻañcē nālumañcāṭiyum muttu nūṟṟaimpatiṉāl niṟai Aiṅkaḻañcu veṇkalavuru patinēḻināl niṟai Irunūṟṟu Aṟupatteṇ palane kaicum cempuru Añcināl niṟai nūṟṟaiympalamum tarāvuru Eṭṭiṉāl niṟai muṉṉūṟṟu muppattaṟu
palamum tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulōttuṅka cōḻatēvarkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu sēnāpatikaḷ pallavarājar Ittēvar paṇṭārañ cōtittaviṭattu nāṅkaḷ Okkakkoṇṭu kaṭavōmāṉa ceppuru nāliṉāl niṟai Eṇpattoṉpatin palamum veṇkalavurup patināṟiṉāl niṟai Irunūṟ
ṟu muppattonpatinpalanē kaicum muttup patinaiñcināl niṟai Araikkaḻañcē mūṉṟu mañcāṭiyu mūṉṟumāvum tarāvuru mūṉṟināl niṟai Irunūṟṟeḻupattoru palamum yāṇṭu Irupattoṉṟāvatu sēṉāpatikaḷ naṉtiyarājar Ittēvar paṇṭārañ cōtitta viṭattu nāṅkaḷ
Aḻittu Okkak koṇṭu kaṭavōmāṉa poṉ patinaiṅ kaḻañcē Oṉpatu mañcāṭiyu mūṉṟumā nūṟṟu nāṟpattēḻu māvum veṇkala niṟai Irunūṟṟu nāṟpattēḻu palanē muppalamum veḷḷiy
l niṟai Irupatiṉ palamum Ākap poṉ muppattaṟu kaḻañcaraiyē mūṉṟu mañcāṭiyu mūṉṟu māvukku kācu Oṉṟukkup poṉ Araikaḻañcākak kācu Eḻupattu mūṉṟē Aṟumāvaraiyum muttu nūṟṟiṟupattaiñcināl niṟai Aiṅkaḻañcaraiyu mūṉṟu mañcāṭiyu mūṉṟumāvukku
[samma]titta kācu E vum veṇkala niṟai Eḻunūṟṟaimppattu nāṟpalanē kaicukku kācu Oṉṟukku veṇkala niṟai muppattaiympalamākak kācu Irupattoṉṟaraiyē Orumāvum cempu niṟai Irunūṟṟu Aṟupattoṉpatinpalanē kaicukku kācu Oṉṟukku cempu niṟai cempu niṟai muppatin palamāka kācu
m veḷḷiy niṟai Irupatiṉ palattukku kācu mukkālum tarā niṟai Āyirat tirunūṟṟirupatiṉ palattukku kācu Oṉṟukkut tarā niṟai Eḻupatin palamākak kācu patinēḻē Eṭṭu māvum Ākak kācu nūṟṟirupattoṉpatē Orumāvarai Itu tiṅkaḷ vaṭṭattu nāḷoṉṟukkuk kācu nālē Āṟu
muntirikaiyāka Eṉ nāḷ nālaraikkuk kācu pattoṉpatē Eḻumākkāṇik kīḻaraiyumāka nāṉ kaṭavēnāṉa kācu muppattiraṇṭē mukkālē Iraṇṭu mākkāṇikkīḻarai Ikkācu Eṉakku vaikka vakai Illāmaiyil Eṉ nāḷ nālaraiyaiyum nāḷ Oṉṟukkuk kācu Añcāka Iṭṭu Ikkōyilil
Āti caṇṭēśvaradevarkku nāṉ viṟṟatu kaikkoṇṭu Eṉṉai rakṣikka vēṇṭumeṉṟu Ikkōyilil śrīmāheśvararai vēṇṭik koṇṭu Ennāḷ nālaraikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku kācu Añcākak kācu Irupattiraṇṭarai Ikkācu Irupattiraṇṭaraikkum Ikkōyililē Āticaṇṭēycuvara tēvarkku viṟṟu
vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttēṉ kāśyapan vāmiyēṉ kituvē vilaiyāvaṇa vum Ituvē vilaiyōlaiyāvatāka
vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttēṉ Ikkōyilil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevarkkuc civabrāhmaṇan kāśyapan pāṇṭan kumarar cuvāmiyēṉ Ippāṇṭan kumāra cuvāmiyār paṇikka Ikkāṇi vilaippiramāṇam Eḻutinēṉ yivvūr madhyastaṉ paṉantāḷuṭaiyāṉ kuṭi tāṅkiyāṉa varīcaṉaṉ Eḻuttu I
kāśyapaṉ pāṇṭaṉ kumāracuvāmiyēṉ Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ tirupparantāḷ vācciyaṉ Ūruṭaiya perumānārāyanēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ vācciyaṉ Utaiya tivākaraṉ tattapaṭṭanēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ Ivvūr madhyastaṉ neṭṭuru vaṉka tēvanēṉ
Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷak kaṇakku neṟkuppai Uṭaiyāṉ vēḷāṉ � Uṭaiyānēṉ Ivai En Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
